## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in Aura AI Harness.

## Permission and privacy impact

- [ ] No new filesystem, network, shell, or macOS authority
- [ ] New authority is documented and visibly approved by the user

## Verification

- [ ] `swift test --package-path AuraNative`
- [ ] English edition checked
- [ ] Korean edition checked
- [ ] No secrets, private conversations, generated releases, or `.DS_Store` files included
